message:
perf(mermaid-layout): LabelGrid spatial index + compact_positions cleanup (bd-1k7c5)

Add LabelGrid spatial index for place_labels collision detection, replacing
O(occupied_count) linear scan per candidate with O(bucket_size) grid lookup.
For diagrams with many labeled edges, this reduces collision checks from
O(E * offsets * N) to O(E * offsets * bucket_avg).

Also simplify compact_positions by hoisting the direction check into a
single `is_horizontal` bool, eliminating repeated match arms in the inner
loops.

All 1930 ftui-extras tests + 1416 demo-showcase tests pass. Clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
